title: The Holocaust from a Global Perspective
further_info: Recommended Reading Norman J. W. Goda und Edward Kissi (Hg.): Outside Looking In. The World Universalizes the Holocaust. New York: Berghahn Books, 2026; Mehnaz Afridi und Mark Celinscak (Hg.): Global Approaches to the Holocaust. Memory, History, and Representation. Lincoln: University of Nebraska Press, 2025; Sarah Phillips Castell und Roni Mikel-Arieli: “Holocaust refugees in the colonial world: an introduction”. Patterns of Prejudice 57 (2023), H. 4–5, S. 221–229; Daniela Gleizer, Emmanuel Kahan und Yael Siman (Hg.): The Holocaust and Latin America. Migration, Resettlement and Memory. Cham: Springer, 2025; Aomar Boum und Sarah Abrevaya Stein (Hg.): The Holocaust and North Africa. Stanford: Stanford University Press, 2019.
